data.description: Remove the LIBRARY's subprocess read branch + the kill-switch after one release with no parity escapes reported. The engine scripts STAY for the CLI/bash path — removal targets the dual path in src/rebar/__init__.py only. Filed up front (per review) so the dual read path can't ossify. AC: dual path gone; single in-process read path; release named in this ticket before Step 3 merges.
data.title: #2 Step 5: remove REBAR_NATIVE_READS kill-switch (tracked up front, tied to a named release)
